Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.458

Title: Extends the expansion of eligibility for World Trade Center death and disability benefits for members of New York's organized militia
Summary: Extends the expansion of eligibility for World Trade Center death and disability benefits for members of New York's organized militia for an additional four years.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the military law, in relation to extending the expansion of eligibility for World Trade Center death and disability benefits for members of New York's organized militia
